message:
test(core): extend proptest coverage for instrumentation layer (ft-2p9cb.1.2.3)

21 new property tests: CorrelationContext (pipeline integrity, gap detection,
serde roundtrip, validation, total elapsed), InstrumentationOverhead (mean,
max, budget, fraction, serde), InstrumentedEnforcer (run count, overflow bounds,
rate, degradation monotonicity, diagnostic serde, validated empty run),
FastProbe (elapsed nonneg, clock regression), error/degradation serde.
55 proptests total + 123 unit tests = 178 tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
